title: [NST] Revolvers recoiled
description:
Revolvers recoiled by NSTprod is a small mod targeted to add vanilla-like revolvers to minecraft

Mod contains::
Revolvers and bullets from different materials, New villager and his little house in the taiga villages, Unique craft system
body:
# Revolvers recoiled 
_**requires [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)**_


A little mod by a newgen team that introduces new type of weapon into the game -- **Revolvers!**

Explore the world and find new villager in taiga forest, **thats where your adventure begins**

### **_Dependecy:_**

- [geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
- [fabric api](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

### **_Feedback:_**

write us on github issues

### **_Features!:_**

- 4 revolvers of different materials, along with the bullets
- First and third person view animations
- Custom workbench
- New villager, who can be found in taiga villages
